label: good
notes: Identity + mini-Miranda, correct balance/date, empathetic, concrete PTP captured.

label: good
notes: Compliant and empathetic; partial-but-valid outcome (scheduled callback, no PTP).

label: bad
notes: Critical FDCPA: explicit threats (garnish wages, jail, police), no disclosure or ID.

label: bad
notes: Harassment/shaming ("you have no excuse", "you're irresponsible") — FDCPA + tone fail.

label: bad
notes: Fabricating the balance and inventing settlement terms ("waive all interest permanently") is an FDCPA §807 misrepresentation, not merely a factual slip — so both compliance and factual_accuracy fail. (Label corrected after the golden set surfaced the judge disagreeing with an initial compliance=pass label.)

label: edge
notes: Discriminator with no FDCPA ambiguity: identity + mini-Miranda + correct facts (compliance passes), but no PTP, no callback, no recap → promise_to_pay fails → overall fails.

label: bad
notes: Must cease and route to counsel after attorney notice; continuing collection is an FDCPA violation and a missed escalation. No regex catches this — tests judge reasoning.

label: bad
notes: Third-party disclosure risk: states balance/account before right-party verification → identity_verification and compliance fail. No regex catches this.

label: edge
notes: Edge: dispute handled compliantly with correct ground-truth facts ($150 / March 15); valid non-payment outcome (dispute + scheduled verification).
